args.query: SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'#','')) AS OwnerId, AVG(CAST(DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) - DATE(o.CreatedDate) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#','')) WHERE DATE(o.CreatedDate) BETWEEN DATE('2023-04-01') AND DATE('2023-04-30') AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY avg_days ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'#','')) AS OwnerId, AVG(CAST(DATE(c.CompanySignedDate) - DATE(o.CreatedDate) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#','')) WHERE DATE(o.CreatedDate) BETWEEN DATE('2023-04-01') AND DATE('2023-04-30') AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY avg_days ASC LIMIT 1;
